headline: Results from Real-World, Long-Term Treatment Persistence with LEQEMBI® (lecanemab-irmb) in the United States Presented at AD/PD™ 2026
summary: Real-World LEQEMBI Data Shows Patients Choose to Stay on Long-Term TreatmentTOKYO and CAMBRIDGE, Mass., March 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Eisai Co., Ltd. (Headquarters: Tokyo, CEO: Haruo Naito, “Eisai”) and Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB, Corporate headquarters: Cambridge, Massachusetts, CEO: Christopher A.
